course.title: JavaScript Basics
course.description: Learn the fundamentals of JavaScript, the programming language of the web.

chapter.title: Variables and Data Types
chapter.description: Learn how to store and manipulate different types of data in JavaScript.

lessons.title: Working with Variables
objectives: Declare variables using let and const
lessons.explanation: Variables are containers for storing data values. Use `let` for values that might change, and `const` for values that will never change.

exercises.statement: Declare a variable named `city` using `let` and assign it the value 'New York'. Then print it.

lessons.title: Basic Math Operations
objectives: Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
lessons.explanation: JavaScript can perform basic math operations using standard operators like `+`, `-`, `*`, and `/`.

exercises.statement: Calculate the product of 7 and 8, store it in a variable called `result`, and print it.
